01605|                 // and the amount is encoded in the data
01606|                 if (txData.startsWith('0xa9059cbb') || txData.startsWith('0x095ea7b3')) {
01607|                   // This is an ERC-20 transfer/approve
01608|                   tokenAddress = inTx.data.to // The contract being called is the token
01609|                   
01610|                   // Decode amount from the last 64 characters
01611|                   try {
01612|                     const amountHex = '0x' + txData.slice(-64)
01613|                     rawAmount = BigInt(amountHex).toString()

01617|                   }
